use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Icon-only buttons for compact UI areas
ai_summary: A versatile button component system with 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Includes full accessibility support with focus-visible rings and disabled states, making it suitable as a foundational UI element across any React application.
